title: Harden after_install Poetry dependency download against transient network errors

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Addressing transient ChunkedEncodingError during poetry install (litellm download) by adding deterministic retries/backoff and transport timeout tuning in deployment after_install script.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Added transient-network hardening to after_install Poetry path: set pip/poetry request timeouts, reduced installer workers, and added 3-attempt retry with backoff around poetry install --only main. Commit pushed: 359c3630.
